utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: OK , you have got to promise that you will never , ever tell Ross that I told you .

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: He is planning your birthday party .

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: Oh my God ! I love him !

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: Oh stop it . Joey already told me .

utterances.text: Well , he did not tell me .

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: Hey , do not look at me . This is Ross thing .

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: This is so typical . I am always the last one to know everything .

utterances.text: No , you are not . We tell you stuff .
